summary.business_type: Hub / knowledge-graph node (hub-and-spoke), Next.js 16 on Vercel
top_findings: No security/hardening HTTP headers (HSTS present, rest missing)
Single shared OG image across tool/data pages
quick_wins: Add logo + knowsAbout to Organization JSON-LD
Add numberOfItems + self-referential items to /tools ItemList
Expand each /tools/<slug> with unique citable context
Add WebSite SearchAction + satellites ItemList to home JSON-LD

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: correct canonicals incl. root trailing-slash fix

findings.title: No security headers
findings.description: Live response lacks CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy. No headers() in next.config.ts.
findings.recommendation: Add headers() block, CSP report-only first.

findings.title: Thin /tools/<slug> pages
findings.description: Each tool hub page is tagline + one description sentence + CTA; too light to rank/be cited as the canonical satellite entry.
findings.recommendation: Add 2-3 unique citable sentences per tool + optional FAQ.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Organization.sameAs complete (12 entities: X + 9 tools + Modelo Zero + YouTube)
Dataset schema w/ CC BY 4.0 + DataDownload

findings.title: Reciprocal wiring unverified
findings.description: Hub->satellite sameAs present; satellite->hub back-references must be confirmed for full entity legibility.
findings.recommendation: Audit each satellite JSON-LD; add furiosadata.com to their sameAs/isPartOf.

findings.title: Org schema missing logo/knowsAbout
findings.description: No logo ImageObject, no knowsAbout topical domains.

findings.title: ItemList not self-referential
findings.description: /tools ItemList items reference external satellite URLs, not the /tools/<slug> hub entries; no numberOfItems.
findings.recommendation: Point items at /tools/<slug> and add numberOfItems.

findings.title: Field data not pulled
findings.description: Lab/infra-inferred; CrUX/GSC field data not fetched in this pass.
findings.recommendation: Pull CrUX via seo-google for field confirmation.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: rich llms.txt (tools, media, datasets, APIs, articles, license)
public JSON APIs + CSV/JSON datasets = high citability
